hierarchy.overline: text-xs font-sans tracking-[0.2em] uppercase text-[#C5A059] font-medium

public_site.hero: Asymmetric editorial layout. Overlapping image and text. Dark olive overlay on image if needed for text readability, but prefer placing text on the nude background alongside the image.
public_site.property_cards: Flat, 1px border (#E5E0D8), no shadow. Image takes top 60%. Minimalist icons for beds/baths/m2. 'Destaque' or 'Financiamento' tags use small pill shapes with #C5A059 border and text.
public_site.about_section: Photo of Larissa offset from text block. Large typographic quote. Generous negative space.
public_site.whatsapp_floating: Fixed bottom-right. Instead of neon green, use a sophisticated interpretation or brand-aligned dark green button with a white WA icon to maintain elegance.

admin_dashboard.sidebar: Dark Olive Green (#2B3A2F) background with gold/nude text for active states. Highly structured.
admin_dashboard.cards: White background, subtle 1px border, shadow-sm on hover. Compact padding (p-4 to p-6).
admin_dashboard.kanban_board: Horizontal scroll area. Columns have light gray/nude backgrounds. Cards are draggable white blocks with subtle borders. Lead status color-coded borders.
admin_dashboard.charts: Recharts using #2B3A2F (primary) and #C5A059 (secondary) to stay on brand.

images.description: White luxury car parked in front of modern white house.
Professional female agent standing in front of a building.
Modern elegant dining and living room.
Subtle beige background texture for organic feel.

instructions_to_main_agent: Build a dual-app architecture: A public marketing site (institutional) and an admin dashboard.
Do not use generic UI slop. Use 'Cormorant Garamond' for headings to enforce the elegant, feminine, premium feel.
Ensure all interactive elements have data-testid attributes (e.g., data-testid='contact-whatsapp-btn').
For the Kanban in the Admin dashboard, build 9 specific columns as requested, applying color-coded hints for each stage.
Do not use transparent headers over images without glassmorphism. Use #F4F1EB as the primary page background.
Public site uses raw HTML/Tailwind for artistic, asymmetric sections. Admin uses Shadcn components.
